description: Extension corpus merged on top of dataset-v2.json by src/eval-heldout.ts. Adds a 4th language (Rust), an HTTP-status source, AND two DISTRACTOR sources (date-format, css-theme) that the model 'saw' but that no span derives from — these raise false-attribution pressure: a correct system must never attribute any span to them.

sources.content: Password hashing uses Argon2id with 64 MB of memory and 3 iterations. Session identifiers are 32 random bytes encoded as base64url.
API responses use 200 for success, 201 when a resource is created, 404 when a resource is missing, and 429 when the client is rate-limited, with a Retry-After header indicating when to retry.
Timestamps in the UI are formatted with the user's locale via Intl.DateTimeFormat. Relative times such as '3h ago' are shown for events under a day old, absolute dates otherwise.
The primary brand color is #2563eb. The spacing scale uses a 4px base unit. Dark mode toggles a data-theme attribute on the root element.
